plugin_manager_visible.note: Confirm NAI Launcher Bridge appears in Krita's Python Plugin Manager.

docker_visible.note: Confirm Settings > Dockers > NAI Launcher Bridge is visible.

launcher_settings_toggle.note: Enable and disable Krita Bridge from Launcher settings and confirm bridge status/discovery file changes.

auto_discovery_connect.note: Confirm the docker connects by reading the Launcher discovery file without copying a token or port manually.

auth_failure_safe.note: Edit the discovery secret to a wrong value and confirm the dock shows an auth error without crashing.

img2img_e2e.note: Send a 1024x1024 Krita canvas through img2img and confirm a returned layer.

inpaint_e2e.note: Use the current Krita selection as the repaint mask, run Inpaint, and confirm only the masked area is written while unmasked pixels keep the original color.

focused_inpaint_e2e.note: Enable Focused Inpaint, use the current Krita selection as the inner repaint area and repaint mask, adjust Minimum Context, change the selection, and confirm the temporary inner/outer concentric rectangles update live, are not baked into the generated source image, and match the generated crop behavior.

krita_cancel_e2e.note: Start a Krita bridge generation, cancel it from the docker, and confirm preview/progress state is cleared.

no_selection_behavior.note: Confirm img2img uses the whole canvas and inpaint reports a clear message without a valid mask.

large_canvas_rejected.note: Confirm a canvas above V1 bounds is rejected or requires explicit focused-inpaint confirmation.

disconnect_generation_safe.note: Disconnect during generation and confirm no partial preview is written as final.

preview_throttle.note: Confirm preview frames update the NAI Preview layer during generation and the docker status shows preview-frame updates or an explicit waiting-for-preview message.

result_layer_aligned.note: Confirm the final image first appears in the Docker result area, single-click previews it, double-click adds it as a new layer, layer dimensions and alignment match the source canvas, colors are not channel-swapped, and inpaint writeback keeps alpha transparent outside the repaint mask.

launcher_history_recorded.note: Confirm Launcher history records the generated final image and key params.

novelai_token_launcher_only.note: Confirm no NovelAI token or account data appears in Krita messages, diagnostics, or logs.

bridge_rejects_unauthenticated.note: Confirm an unauthenticated local WebSocket client is rejected.

gallery_send_e2e.note: Send a generated/gallery image to Krita and confirm it arrives through the authenticated connection.

disabled_bridge_existing_flows.note: Disable the bridge and confirm existing generation, gallery, and Vibe flows still work.
